---
name: Feature or role-family request
about: Suggest a new role family, archetype, renderer improvement, or contributor-facing enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the feature, extension, or role-family request.

## Why it matters

Explain the use case and who benefits from it.

## Current gap

What part of the repo is limiting this today?

## Proposed direction

If you already have a concrete idea, outline the expected routing, template, bank, or QA changes.

## Scope check

State whether this is:

- a new role family / archetype
- a starter-mode demo improvement
- a quality-mode workflow improvement
- a docs / contributor UX improvement

## Privacy check

Do not include private CVs or private candidate data in the request.
